name: asset
description: Tools for the firm's security master and custody mapping on the ayunit MCP. Reads/writes Global.Asset (one row per instrument, keyed by Asset) and Portfolio.AssetCustody (per-custodian ticker/CUSIP ↔ Asset link) — registration-by-analogy, classification validation against lookups, custody identifier lifecycle, (v0.4.0) read-only asset lookup via identify_asset + v_AssetCustody as the mandatory pre-check before asset-register, and (v0.5.0) assetcustody-fill: fleet-wide AssetCustody INSERT + Portfolio.CustodyPosition back-fill via Update_Missing_Asset, the durable upstream fix that unblocks PENDING transactions per-mapping instead of per-pk.
